title: Melano CC Deep Clear Face Wash 130g
content_html:
Melano CC Deep Clear Face Wash combines Vitamin C brightening with Hyaluronic Acid hydration and Licorice Root soothing — a refreshing foam cleanser that tackles dullness and excess sebum in Bangladesh's humid climate.

As a foam-based cleanser, it pairs best with an alcohol-free toner applied while skin is still slightly damp. Use in the morning as a standalone cleanser or as the second step after an oil-based cleanser in your evening routine.

Key Benefits

  • Brightening — Vitamin C helps even skin tone and reduce dullness
  • Hydration — Hyaluronic Acid draws moisture into the skin
  • Soothing — Licorice Root Extract calms irritation and redness

Key Ingredients

Vitamin C — antioxidant that brightens skin and fades dark spots

Hyaluronic Acid — humectant that retains moisture for plump, hydrated skin

Licorice Root Extract — anti-inflammatory agent that soothes and evens skin tone

Best For

  • Normal, dry, and combination skin
  • Dull or uneven skin tone
  • Dehydrated skin needing gentle hydration

Not Recommended For

  • Extremely sensitive skin that reacts to Vitamin C derivatives — patch test first
  • Those who prefer non-foaming, cream-based cleansers

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water
  2. Squeeze a small amount (about 1 cm) onto your palm
  3. Lather with water, then gently massage onto damp skin in circular motions for 30–60 seconds
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel
  5. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp

Routine Fit

Use as the first cleansing step in the morning or as the second step after an oil-based cleanser in the evening. Follow with toner, serum, and moisturiser to lock in hydration.
meta_desc: Melano Vitamin C & Hyaluronic Acid foam cleanser for dull, dry skin — brightening. Buy original at Emart Bangladesh — COD available.

title: Skin Cafe Hydrating Hyaluronic Acid Face Wash with Seaweed Extract (Dry & Sensitive Skin) 140ml
content_html:
Skin Cafe Hydrating Hyaluronic Acid Face Wash is a gentle foam cleanser formulated with Hyaluronic Acid to replenish moisture without stripping the skin barrier. In Bangladesh’s humid climate, this lightweight hydrating wash helps maintain a healthy moisture balance, making it ideal for those with dryness or sensitivity concerns.

Safe to pair with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin, this cleanser works as the first or second step in your routine. Use it after makeup removal or as a standalone morning cleanser, followed by a hydrating toner and moisturiser.

Key Benefits

  • Deep Hydration — Hyaluronic Acid draws moisture into the skin, preventing water loss
  • Gentle Cleansing — Foam texture removes impurities without causing irritation
  • Barrier Support — Helps maintain a healthy skin barrier by avoiding over-stripping

Key Ingredients

Hyaluronic Acid — a humectant that attracts and retains moisture, keeping skin plump and hydrated

Best For

  • Dry skin
  • Sensitive skin
  • Normal to combination skin needing extra hydration

Not Recommended For

  • Oily or acne-prone skin looking for deep exfoliation — lacks active acne-fighting ingredients like salicylic acid
  • Those with fungal acne — Hyaluronic Acid alone may not address fungal triggers

How to Use

  1. Wet face with lukewarm water
  2. Dispense a pea-sized amount onto palm and lather between hands
  3. Massage gently onto damp skin in circular motions for 30–60 seconds
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel

Routine Fit

Use as the first or second cleanse in your AM or PM routine. Follow with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp, then apply a hydrating serum and moisturiser. Avoid using with other harsh foaming cleansers to prevent over-cleansing.
meta_desc: Skin Cafe hydrating foam cleanser with Hyaluronic Acid for dry, sensitive skin — gentle hydration. Authentic Bangladesh import — buy at Emart BD, COD.

title: The Derma Co 2% Sali Cinamide Anti Acne Face Wash 80ml
content_html:
The Derma Co 2% Sali Cinamide Anti-Acne Foaming Face Wash targets acne and blemishes with a dual-action blend of Salicylic Acid and Niacinamide, making it an ideal daily cleanser for Bangladesh’s humid climate where excess oil and breakouts are common.

This foaming cleanser pairs well with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after rinsing, and fits into a daytime or nighttime routine before serums or moisturisers.

Key Benefits

  • Salicylic Acid — penetrates pores to exfoliate and clear acne-causing debris
  • Niacinamide — helps reduce blemish marks and supports skin barrier function

Key Ingredients

Salicylic Acid — a beta hydroxy acid that exfoliates inside pores to treat and prevent acne

Niacinamide — a form of vitamin B3 that calms inflammation and fades post-acne marks

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Acne-prone skin
  • Combination skin with breakouts

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or compromised skin — Salicylic Acid may over-dry if used too frequently
  • Those allergic to salicylates — avoid due to Salicylic Acid content

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water
  2. Dispense a small amount of foam and massage gently over the face for 30–60 seconds, avoiding the eye area
  3. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry
  4. Use twice daily, morning and evening

Routine Fit

Use as the first step in your morning or evening routine. Follow with an alcohol-free toner on slightly damp skin, then apply a serum and moisturiser.
meta_desc: The Derma Co foam cleanser for oily, acne-prone skin with 2% Salicylic Acid & Niacinamide. 2% Salicylic + Niacinamide formula — buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: The Derma Co Tran Zealic Pigmentation Corrector Face Wash 80ml
content_html:
The Derma Co Tran Zealic Pigmentation Correct foam cleanser combines tranexamic acid and niacinamide to target hyperpigmentation in Bangladesh's humid climate. This gentle foaming wash helps brighten uneven skin tone while controlling excess oil.

Safe to pair with any face cleanser, use this foam as your second step in a double cleanse or standalone morning wash. Follow with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin for optimal hydration.

Key Benefits

  • Hyperpigmentation correction — Tranexamic acid inhibits melanin overproduction to fade dark spots
  • Brightening + barrier support — Niacinamide reduces discoloration and strengthens skin barrier
  • Gentle foam texture — Removes impurities without stripping natural moisture

Key Ingredients

Tranexamic acid — A melanin-blocking agent that targets pigmentation and prevents new dark spots.

Niacinamide — Vitamin B3 that brightens skin, improves uneven tone, and supports barrier function.

Best For

  • Hyperpigmentation-prone skin
  • Uneven skin tone
  • Oily and combination skin in humid climates

Not Recommended For

  • Extremely dry, flaky skin — foam cleansers may further dehydrate; opt for a cream or milk cleanser instead.
  • Active acne with open wounds — niacinamide is generally safe, but foaming action can irritate broken skin; use a non-foaming cleanser until healed.

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense a pea-sized amount onto your palm and lather with water.
  3. Gently massage the foam over your face in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry with a clean towel.
  5. Use twice daily, morning and evening.

Routine Fit

Use after oil-based cleanser (if double cleansing) or as the first step in your AM/PM routine. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then serum and moisturiser.
meta_desc: The Derma Co pigmentation foam cleanser with Tranexamic acid + Niacinamide for uneven skin tone. Buy original at Emart Bangladesh — COD available.

title: Boots Everyday Cucumber Face Wash 150ml
content_html:
Boots Everyday Cucumber Face Wash is a light foam cleanser that refreshes normal to combination skin. Cucumber and Vitamins help remove daily impurities without stripping moisture — ideal for Bangladesh’s humid climate where skin needs a gentle yet effective daily wash.

This face wash pairs well with any basic face cleanser for a double-cleanse routine. In a simple routine, use it as the second step after an oil-based cleanser, or as a standalone AM/PM cleanser. Follow with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp.

Key Benefits

  • Gentle cleansing — Cucumber extract removes dirt and excess oil without irritation
  • Vitamin nourishment — Vitamins help maintain skin’s natural softness and radiance

Key Ingredients

Cucumber — Known for its soothing and refreshing properties, helps calm skin and provide light hydration.

Vitamins — Support skin health by nourishing and protecting against environmental stressors.

Best For

  • Normal skin
  • Combination skin
  • Oily skin (as a balancing cleanser)

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or dehydrated skin — foam texture may further strip natural oils if used without a hydrating toner
  • Extremely sensitive skin with active breakouts — cucumber is mild but foam can irritate if skin barrier is compromised

How to Use

  1. Wet face with lukewarm water.
  2. Squeeze a small amount (about a pea-size) onto palm.
  3. Gently massage over face in circular motions for about 30 seconds, avoiding eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel.

Routine Fit

Use as the second cleanser in a double-cleanse routine after an oil-based cleanser, or as a standalone AM/PM face wash. Always follow with an alcohol-free toner to restore pH balance, then moisturiser.
meta_desc: Boots Cucumber Face Wash for normal, combination skin with cucumber and Vitamins — gentle daily cleansing. Authentic UK import — buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.
